source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A U-tube manometer filled with water (density = 1000 kg/m$^3$) shows a height difference of 25 cm. What is the gauge pressure? If the right branch is tilted to make an angle of $30^{\circ}$ with the horizontal, as shown in figure, what should the length of the column in the tilted tube be relative to the U-tube?
